comment: Seed eval set. A question passes if the agent surfaced at least one of the expected pages via show_page OR if any expected substring appears in the final reply text. Edit / expand as you wish.

questions.question: What's the duty cycle for MIG welding at 200A on 240V?
questions._note: Duty cycle tables are image-only on p.16/25/27 (no extractable text), plus mentioned on p.7,19,23.

questions.question: I'm getting porosity in my flux-cored welds. What should I check?
What polarity setup do I need for TIG welding? Which socket does the ground clamp go in?
What process should I use for 1/4 inch mild steel?
How do I install and tension the wire feed roller for 0.030 wire?
